channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Governor Alia Tell Political Appointees Eyeing 2027 Elections to Step Down Before March 30
item.description: Governor Hyacinth Alia of Benue State don talk say any political appointee for him administration wey dey plan contest for elective position for the 2027 general election suppose resign before March 3...

item.title: BTS Makes Epic Comeback in Seoul After Four-Year Hiatus
item.description: Tens of thousands of BTS fans gathered in Seoul to witness the band's highly anticipated return after a nearly four-year hiatus, caused by mandatory military service for its members. The event was a g...

item.title: Weather Alert: Easterlies to Cause Rainshowers Across Metro Manila and Other Regions
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA) has forecast that easterly winds will bring rains across Metro Manila and other parts of...

item.title: United Airlines reduces flights amid rising fuel costs and prolonged oil price surge
item.description: United Airlines is planning further flight reductions over the next two quarters in response to soaring jet fuel prices driven by the ongoing war in Iran. The airline’s CEO, Scott Kirby, warned staff ...

item.title: Christopher Morales Williams of Canada wins gold and sets a championship record in the 400m at the World Indoor Championships
item.description: Canada's Christopher Morales Williams claimed gold in the men's 400-metre event at the World Indoor Athletics Championships in Torun, Poland, with a record-setting time of 44.76 seconds. The 21-year-o...

item.title: How South African consumers are prioritising value in their purchases amidst economic strain
item.description: As South African consumers grapple with rising living costs, from soaring electricity prices to higher food and fuel expenses, the demand for value-driven brands has surged. This shift in consumer beh...

item.title: Dalton Dubois Makes History as the First Transgender Model on Chanel's Paris Fashion Week Runway
item.description: Dalton Dubois, a 24-year-old model from Guelph, Ontario, has made history by becoming the first transgender person to walk on Chanel Exclusive's runway at Paris Fashion Week. Starting her career durin...

item.title: Iowa Democrats look for locally grounded candidates like Rob Sand to flip governor’s race in 2026
item.description: Democrats in Iowa are trying to rebuild their appeal in a state that has shifted sharply rightward over the past two decades, focusing on candidates who can connect with rural, working‑class voters on...

item.title: Review of the First Episode of Saturday Night Live UK: A Promising Start
item.description: The inaugural episode of Saturday Night Live UK, Sky’s adaptation of the iconic American show, has finally aired. Drawing from over 1,200 applicants, the production features 11 actors and a 20-strong ...

item.title: Banksy's Identity Revealed as Robin Gunningham: Exploring the Role of Anonymity in Art
item.description: A Reuters investigation has reportedly identified the elusive street artist Banksy as Robin Gunningham, a bespectacled middle-aged man from Bristol, England, reviving rumors that date back to a 2008 B...

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Addresses Rumours, Says There's No Feud with Sabrina Carpenter and Wishes Her Success
item.description: In a recent interview with British Vogue, Filipino-American singer Olivia Rodrigo cleared up long-standing speculation about a supposed rivalry with fellow pop star Sabrina Carpenter. Rodrigo, known f...

item.title: Tumbler Ridge Advances to Hockeyville Final Amid Community Recovery Efforts
item.description: Tumbler Ridge, a small northern B.C. community of about 2,400 people, has been named one of the two finalists in the annual Kraft Hockeyville contest. The recognition brings the town closer to winning...

item.title: California Sheriff Investigates Riverside County Ballot Count Amid Allegations of Voting Irregularities
item.description: Riverside County Sheriff Chad Bianco has seized more than 650,000 ballots from California’s November 2025 election as part of an investigation into alleged voting irregularities tied to Proposition 50...

item.title: Chuck Norris Discovered His Secret Daughter Dina in 1991 After Almost 30 Years
item.description: Legendary action star Chuck Norris, famous for his role in Walker, Texas Ranger, passed away at the age of 86 on March 19, 2026, following a sudden medical emergency in Hawaii. His family confirmed th...

item.title: South African Home Affairs Official Involved in Visa Fraud and Security Breach in Nigeria
item.description: A home affairs official stationed at the South African high commission in Abuja, Nigeria, is facing disciplinary action after being implicated in a visa fraud scheme. Boitumelo Shounyane allegedly fac...

item.title: Transport groups postpone planned Monday strike to discuss fare hikes and subsidies amid surging fuel costs
item.description: Some major transport groups in the Philippines, including the Federation of Jeepney Operators and Drivers Association of the Philippines (FEJODAP) and the Liga ng Transportasyon at Operators sa Pilipi...

item.title: Sister of missing Toronto man Taron Stepanyan appeals for information in ongoing homicide investigation
item.description: More than two years after Taron Stepanyan, a 40-year-old father, vanished from his apartment near Chichester Place in Toronto on December 23, 2023, his sister Tatev Stepanyan has travelled from Armeni...

item.title: Officer in Tumakuru alleges harassment by senior, found dead at office
item.description: Mallikarjunaiah G.E., an Assistant Director in the Social Welfare Department in Tumakuru, was found dead at his office in Pavagada. Prior to his death, he recorded a video alleging harassment by his s...

item.title: Former FBI Director and Special Counsel Robert Mueller dies at 81
item.description: Robert S. Mueller III, the former Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) and special counsel who led the probe into Russian interference in the 2016 U.S. presidential election and poten...

item.title: Analysis of Reform Party’s Declining Poll Numbers and YouGov’s Methodology
item.description: Nigel Farage has criticised YouGov for allegedly presenting deceptively low polling figures for his party, Reform, claiming that the polling company breached British Polling Council transparency rules...
